prestazioni: AMC 304ci (5.0L) V8 engine swap with a Holley Sniper EFI 2300 system, replacing the carburetor for precise fuel delivery and a 10-15% power increase over stock (250-275 hp). Paired with a Mopar Performance camshaft (PN P5249873) for aggressive lift and duration (224°/230° @ 0.050") to optimize torque in the 2,500-5,000 RPM range.

NV4500 5-speed manual transmission swap with a Centerforce DFX dual-friction clutch (PN 440136) and a McLeod hydraulic throwout bearing (PN 8617) for smoother engagement under high-torque loads. Upgraded output shaft yoke (PN 5211024) to handle increased power without shearing.

Custom 3.5-inch exhaust system with MagnaFlow 17155 stainless steel mandrel-bent tubing and a Borla 40254 Pro XS muffler (straight-through design, 30% backpressure reduction). Headers by Hooker (PN 6111-1HKR) with 1.75-inch primaries and 3-inch collectors for optimal scavenging on the AMC 304 V8.
estetica: Rugged Ridge XHD tubular front bumper (PN 11511.11) with integrated Warn Zeon 10-S winch (10,000 lb capacity) and a custom powder-coated matte black finish. Rear bumper replaced with a Smittybilt XRC rear bumper (PN 76851) with a swing-out tire carrier and jerry can mounts.

Bestop Trektop NX soft top (PN 56851-35) in charcoal diamond fabric with a half-door kit (PN 56821-01) for a retro-modern hybrid look. Full interior reupholstery with Katzkin leather (custom pattern: diamond stitching in black with red contrast piping) and a custom roll cage by Poison Spyder (PN 81-02-02) with bolt-in harness bar.

15x10-inch Raceline Black Rock 941 wheels (PN 941-5108) with 4.5-inch backspacing, wrapped in BFGoodrich KM3 tires (35x12.50R15). Custom fender flares by Bushwacker (PN 14058-02) in matte black with a 3-inch extended lip for aggressive stance and tire clearance.
